result.summary: Created two parallel refinements, each exercising three in-run variations: Pogo Storm adds Capacitor, Lancer, and Phase Guard relays before the prior failure point; Orbitbound replaces repeated whole-ring clamps with Pinch, Sweep, and Rake beats within about 12 seconds. Schema, typecheck, bundle, boot, screenshot, two-pass visible player/attachment/threat motion, restart, and zero-console-error checks passed.
